summary: Creates a new mutable record with default positions and unresolved optional metadata.
signature_intent: Constructs an instance with initial generated-position state and empty source/original/name metadata.
behavior: Sets the starting generated position to the first line and first column.
Marks the generated range end as unknown.
Marks associated source metadata as absent.
Marks optional naming metadata as absent.
edge_cases: Does not accept or use arguments.
Does not return an explicit value.
Requires constructor-style or bound-object invocation to initialize the target object.
forbidden_details: Do not expose internal property identifiers.
Do not mention repository names or source paths.
Do not describe implementation-specific ordering beyond observable initialization behavior.
